name: o1-mini
description: A faster and more cost-efficient option in the o1 series, ideal for coding tasks that require speed and lower resource consumption. - Global Standard deployment available by default. - Standard (regional) deployments are currently only available for select customers who received access as part of the o1-preview limited access release.
tagline: A faster and more cost-efficient option in the o1 series, ideal for coding tasks that require speed and lower resource consumption.
